summary: Run migrate_to_sqlite_embeddings.py locally once; confirm reconciliation counts match

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Migration run on 2026-04-17: ChromaDB=120, chunk_embeddings=120, Chroma IDs missing from nodes=0. The Chroma→SQLite transfer itself is clean (script's actual job). ChromaDB in this local env was never fully populated — 2411 of 2531 chunk nodes have no vector at all, neither in Chroma nor (consequently) in chunk_embeddings. That gap is pre-existing, not migration loss, and will be resolved by Phase 3 re-embed against Google text-embedding-005.

resolution.note: Reconciliation verified: Chroma vectors (120) == chunk_embeddings rows (120), 0 orphan IDs. The 2411-chunk gap to full nodes count is pre-existing ChromaDB incompleteness (not migration loss); Phase 3 (b3723c71) will re-embed the full corpus. Migration script's transfer semantics confirmed clean.
